name: Validate traveler details form validation logic errors -- @1.1 John Doe - Blank DOB

steps.name: Given the user opens the corporate travel portal application homepage
And the user dismisses initial overlay login alerts if present
When the user navigates into the Travel Insurance matrix panel page
When the user configures the flow map targeting destination country "UAE"
And the user configures traveler volume parameters for "1" rows
And the user executes plan searches and clicks buy now on plan card position "1"
And the user attempts info validation using name John Doe, dob , gender Male, mobile 9876543210, and email john@test.com
Then the system field tracking validation engine must surface the error "Please enter valid Date of Birth" for field type "DOB"

parameters.name: expected_error
parameters.value: Please enter valid Date of Birth
